name: Chili#3
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Add onion and green pepper; cook until wilted, stirring occasionally.
3. Add the ground meat to the skillet and stir with the edge of a heavy spoon to break up any lumps.
4. Sprinkle garlic, chili powder, cumin, and oregano evenly over the meat.
5. Stir to combine all ingredients.
6. Add the bay leaf, black pepper, canned tomatoes, and red wine vinegar.
7. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat to low.
8. Simmer for 1 hour, stirring occasionally until tender.
